title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF MAGUININANGO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALLACAPAN, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SAN JUAN.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 130 / 59 OG No. 37, 6231 (September 16, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3608, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF MAGUININANGO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALLACAPAN, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN, TO SAN JUAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Maguininango in the Municipality of Allacapan, Province of Cagayan, is hereby changed to San Juan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
